---
title: "SBT 2026"
subtitle: "Operating model and monitoring procedure materials"
listing: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: includes/site-icons.html
---

::: {.hero}
![](images/ccsbt_logo.png){fig-alt="CCSBT logo" width="120"}

This site collects 2026 southern bluefin tuna model documentation, data preparation notes, and rendered working papers.
:::

## Documents

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### OMMP16 model notes

Rendered Quarto output for the OMMP16 model setup and diagnostics.

[Open OMMP16 (HTML)](OMMP16/OMMP16.html) | [PDF](OMMP16/OMMP16.pdf)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Length-frequency processing

Japanese longline size-frequency and CPUE processing notes.

[Open length-frequency document (HTML)](doc/NewLengthFreq.html) | [PDF](doc/NewLengthFreq.pdf)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Data weighting

Data weighting diagnostics and effective sample-size sensitivity notes.

[Open data-weighting document (HTML)](doc/Data_weighting.html) | [PDF](doc/Data_weighting.pdf)
:::
:::

## Repository

[View source on GitHub](https://github.com/CCSBT-Dev/sbt_2026)
